title: Lightroom Rendition
description: Schema for an Adobe Lightroom asset rendition. Renditions are server-generated preview images derived from the master file with current develop settings applied. Available in multiple sizes from small thumbnails to full-resolution exports.

rendition_type.description: Size classification of the rendition. thumbnail2x is a small thumbnail, numeric values indicate the longest edge in pixels, and fullsize is the maximum available resolution.

asset_id.description: Unique identifier of the source asset

catalog_id.description: Unique identifier of the catalog containing the source asset

width.description: Width of the rendition in pixels

height.description: Height of the rendition in pixels

contentType.description: MIME type of the rendition image

contentLength.description: Size of the rendition file in bytes

created.description: Timestamp when the rendition was generated

updated.description: Timestamp when the rendition was last regenerated
